name: claude-matrix-bridge
description: Bridge Matrix messages directly to Claude Code CLI sessions

scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check ask-user.js && node --check viewer/server.js && node --check setup-user.mjs && node --check verify-bots.mjs && node --check bootstrap-crosssigning.mjs && node --check lib/transcribe.js
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run check && npm test && npm run audit:high
